raw_source.title: [Remote] Satoshi Protocol is looking for Content Marketer, $2,000 - $3,000 / month
raw_source.body:
## About
Satoshi Protocol is the first CDP protocol built on BEVM, users could deposit BTC as collateral to borrow stablecoin SAT. This serves as the cornerstone for BTCfi to unleash trillions worth of Bitcoin.

## Responsibilities
- Content Creation: Write and produce high-quality content for blogs, articles, website copy, announcements, press releases, and marketing materials.

- Daily Tweets: Craft and post daily tweets to engage with the community and drive awareness.

- PR and Announcements: Draft and distribute press releases and announcements to promote key milestones and updates.

- Collaborative Writing: Work closely with the marketing team to develop and execute content strategies that support marketing campaigns and community engagement efforts.

- SEO Optimization: Ensure all content is optimized for search engines to improve visibility and engagement.

- Content Calendar: Maintain a content calendar to ensure timely delivery of content across all channels.

- Research: Stay up-to-date with industry trends and news to create relevant and engaging content.

- Editing and Proofreading: Edit and proofread content to ensure accuracy, clarity, and consistency.

## Requirements
- Writing Experience: Demonstrated experience in content writing, with a focus on DeFi and Web3.

- Bilingual Skills: Strong writing and verbal communication skills in both Chinese and English.

- Digital Marketing Knowledge: Understanding of digital marketing principles and SEO best practices.

- Independent Worker: Ability to work independently and thrive in a fast-paced startup environment.

- Blockchain Knowledge: Deep understanding of Bitcoin and blockchain technology.

- Attention to Detail: Strong attention to detail and commitment to producing high-quality content.

## Job Nature
- Full-time
- Remote 

## Salary and Benefits
$2,000 - $3,000 / month
- Be part of a team at the cutting edge of DeFi and Bitcoin Layer 2 technologies.
- Opportunity to shape the content strategy of a pioneering stablecoin protocol.
- Work in a dynamic and collaborative environment.
- Competitive salary and benefits package.

## Contact
marketing@satoshiprotocol.org

## How to Apply

1. Send Application Email
    - Send your application to: mailto:marketing@satoshiprotocol.org
    - Subject : the position + your name
    
2. Email Content
    - The position you are applying for
    - CV
    - Resume
    - Availability for meetings
    - The earliest date you can start
    - Where do you find the recruiting message?
    
3. Recommender
    - If you have a recommender, please include their name and contact information in the email.
    
Thank you for your application. We look forward to learning more about you and discussing potential collaboration opportunities.

Links
- Website : https://satoshiprotocol.org/
- Twitter : https://twitter.com/SatoshiBEVM
- Medium : https://medium.com/@satoshi-protocol
- Doc : https://docs.satoshiprotocol.org/intro/introduction
- Telegram : https://t.me/satoshi_sat
- Discord : https://discord.gg/satoshiprotocol
